betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Fusion Power§f extraction uses the §bFusion Reactor Boiler§f for steam output.

§eOutput Type:§f
Produces §bSuper Dense Steam§f (200 TU/mB) - highest energy density.

§ePort Sharing Rules:§f
Multiple connected §bMHD Turbines§f affect output distribution:
• Attachments on same port reduce individual efficiency
• Spread across different ports for maximum yield

§eAlternative:§f
§bMHD Turbines§f provide +35% efficiency through direct plasma-to-electricity conversion.

§aTip:§f Plan your Fusion Reactor ports carefully for optimal power extraction.
